Package org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.scim

Class ScimConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.scim.ScimConfiguration
Direct Known Subclasses:
ScimIdentityProviderPlugin
public class ScimConfiguration extends Object
Configuration class for SCIM Identity Provider.
